title: Controlled Drugs Distribution: Compliance Checklist
alt: Checklist of controls for compliant controlled drugs distribution

items.label: Hold both licences
items.desc: WDA(H) plus the Home Office CD licence for your Schedules

items.label: Approved safe custody
items.desc: CD cabinet or room meeting Safe Custody Regs 1973 standards

items.label: Restricted, logged access
items.desc: Named authorised staff with auditable key or access control

items.label: CD register to ALCOA+
items.desc: Prompt, chronological, indelible entries; regular reconciliation

items.label: Bona fide checks
items.desc: Verify each customer is entitled to receive the CDs

items.label: Witnessed destruction
items.desc: Denature Schedule 2 CDs irretrievably; record and witness it
